title: Ensure Open Curly Brace is at the Beginning of a Line
description: This rule enforces the coding convention of placing the open curly brace at the beginning of a line to facilitate efficient collaboration. Non-compliance with this rule might make the code harder to read and maintain.
recommendation: Always place the open curly brace at the beginning of a new line.
impact: Improves code readability and maintainability by enforcing a common code formatting standard.
